word: H5312 - נְפַק - nᵉphaq - nef-ak' - Come forth

sections.paragraph:
Original: נפק

Transliteration: nephaq

Phonetic: nef-ak'

BDB Definition:

  1. to go or come out, bring or come forth
    1. (Peal) to go out or forth
    2. (Aphel) to bring forth

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2868

Part(s) of speech: Verb
